acquisition method: we employed sequential window acquisition of all theoretical fragment ion spectra (SWATH) mass spectrometry (MS)
alkylation reagent: alkylated with 40 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature in the dark for 30 min
cleavage agent: digested with sequencing grade porcine trypsin (Promega, 1:100 trypsin:protein)
collision energy: with a 15-eV collision energy spread regardless of the precursor charge state
instrument: 1 μg of yeast tryptic peptides was injected on a 6600 TripleTof mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: reduced with 12 mM DTT at 37 °C for 30 min
